name: The Captain's Harem
description: Your plane has crashed on a pristine, uncharted island, and you are the only thing standing between life and death for three traumatized high school cheerleaders. The rules of civilization are already fading, replaced by the raw, desperate law of the jungle. Can you lead them, protect them, and provide for them? The choices you make—who to save, who to comfort, who to reward—will forge dangerous new alliances and spark forbidden tensions under the relentless sun. This isn’t a vacation; it’s a test of survival, morality, and desire. How far will you go to survive?
creator: Ironhead88
